flows: utente -> prodotto — association="has"; label="has"; explanation="an utente can have one or more prodotto"
this diagram models the structure of a system for managing products and users.
the `prodotto` class has attributes related to its properties and ownership.
the `utente` class represents a user and has a relationship with the `prodotto` class, indicating that a user can own or manage products.
